final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit Serial-in Serial-out (SISO) shift register with a serial input (SI), a clock input (CLK), and a reset input (RST). On each falling edge of the clock, if the reset is not active, the shift register should shift in the serial input from SI and shift out the least significant bit (LSB) to a serial output (SO). The shift register should be initialized to all ones on reset.
module SISO_Shift_Register (
    input wire SI,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg SO
);
    reg [3:0] shift_reg; // 4-bit shift register

    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            shift_reg <= 4'b0000; // Reset to 0
            SO <= 1'b0; // Initialize output
        end else begin
            SO <= shift_reg[3]; // Output the MSB
            shift_reg <= {shift_reg[2:0], SI}; // Shift left and input new data
        end
    end
endmodule

The shift register should be initialized to all ones on reset.
